message:
Add Integration See Also component with Plug icon

Introduce PlugIcon and Integration component for cross-referencing
integration pages from reference documentation See Also sections.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+---
+// Plug icon for Integrations - connecting to external systems
+---
+
+<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22v-5"></path><path d="M9 8V2"></path><path d="M15 8V2"></path><path d="M18 8v5a4 4 0 0 1-4 4h-4a4 4 0 0 1-4-4V8Z"></path></svg>

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@ +--- +import PlugIcon from '../icons/PlugIcon.astro'; + +const path = Astro.slots.has('default') + ? (await Astro.slots.render('default')).trim() + : ''; +const href = `/integrations/${path}`; +// Convert path to title: "microsoft/windows-event-logs" -> "Windows event logs" +const title = path + .split('/') + .pop()! + .split('-') + .map((word, i) => i === 0 ? word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1) : word) + .join(' '); +--- + +{title}
